ModMetaData.name: StackControl
ModMetaData.author: aveasura
ModMetaData.description:
Stack Control is a lightweight stack size configuration mod for RimWorld.
Configure item stack sizes with simple presets or exact custom limits.
Features: - No HugsLib or Harmony required. - Simple presets: Small x10, Medium x50, Large x100, Huge x500. - Custom stack limits by item category. - Supports regular stackable items, body parts, implants and selected safe special items. - Does not change weapons, armor, apparel, corpses or quality-based items. - Safe special items include neurotrainers, psytrainers, psylink neuroformers, psychic pulsers and mech serums.
Multiplayer: All players should use the same mod version and the same settings.
